description_long: This object is a compact, rectangular electronic device with a predominantly orange casing and a dark, glossy front panel. The front features a digital display area, likely for showing time or other information, with the brand name 'WHAM!' visible in white text. The top surface is equipped with several round and oval physical buttons, each labeled for different functions such as 'SNOOZE', 'ALARM', and 'TIME', suggesting it is a digital alarm clock. The rear side has a large, grid-patterned black vent or speaker grille, indicating the presence of an audio output. The sides are smooth and unadorned, with subtle contour lines for added grip and style. The overall design is modern and functional, suitable for placement on a bedside table or desk in an urban environment.
description: A compact orange digital alarm clock with a glossy display, labeled buttons on top, and a large rear speaker grille.
description_view_0: Front view showing the dark display panel, brand logo, and labeled control buttons on top.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the smooth, curved orange casing with no visible controls or features.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the large, black grid-patterned speaker grille covering most of the back surface.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the same smooth, curved orange casing as the left, with no additional features.
